title: Irish Beef Fold Flaky Post Recipe
description: A hearty and delicious meal made with tender beef, crispy flaky pastry, and a side of post-workout recovery food.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Season the beef with salt, pepper, and black pepper.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the beef for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the beef to a baking sheet and top with a pat of irish butter.
Place the beef in the oven and cook for 10-12 minutes or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
While the beef is cooking, mix the post-workout recovery shake according to package instructions.
Once the beef is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the beef with a side of the post-workout recovery shake and a slice of flaky pastry.
Enjoy your delicious and satisfying Irish Beef Fold Flaky Post Recipe!
